prerequisites: Administrator privileges or higher, required to enable API access and generate an API key.
An API key generated in the account (the connector's required api_key config field).

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: Hub Planner authenticates requests with an API key passed in the Authorization header (no 'Bearer' prefix). Generate the key under Settings -> API as either a Read Only or Read & Write key. This maps to the connector's required api_key secret field.

setupSteps.title: Enable API access in Hub Planner
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Hub Planner (Resource Flow) account with an Administrator or higher account. Go to Settings -> API and enable API access. If you later disable API access, all generated keys are revoked.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: In Settings -> API, generate a key. Choose Read Only for extraction use cases (the source connector only needs read access). Copy the generated key and store it securely; treat it as sensitive as a password.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the generated key in the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it in the Authorization header (without the 'Bearer' keyword) against the API base URL https://api.hubplanner.com/v1.
